arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim responds as Jim Ratcliffe brands Man Utd stars ‘overpaid and not good enough’
arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has warned his beleaguered squad that only results will be able to help them silence their critics before the end of the season

arts.ttl: Man Utd confirm Leny Yoro injury recovery timeframe
arts.sum: Manchester United will be without centre-back Leny Yoro for Thursday night's crucial Europa League clash with Real Sociedad, but the teenage Frenchman's absence is set to be short-term.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim confirms Manchester United injury latest in major boost ahead of Real Sociedad clash
arts.sum: The Red Devils will have a key player back from injury for the Europa League decider

arts.ttl: Man Utd told to 'write cheque' to Harry Maguire and rid dressing room of 'disease'
arts.sum: Man Utd defender Harry Maguire recently had his contract extended at Old Trafford, but the club has been told they should get rid of the 32-year-old to allow room for improvements

arts.ttl: Teddy Sheringham says he had a ‘brilliant’ teammate at Tottenham who Man Utd were desperate to sign
arts.sum: Manchester United have a history of pinching some of Tottenham’s best players over the years. Indeed, the likes of Dimitar Berbatov and Michael Carrick swapped...

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim opens up on "really blunt" Sir Jim Ratcliffe relationship after Man United stadium announcement
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim says that he has "a really blunt and honest" relationship with the club's minority shareholder Sir Jim Ratcliffe.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs 'open talks' over move for Man United-linked midfielder
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur reportedly hold talks with representatives of Lille midfielder Angel Gomes, who is attracting interest from Manchester United and West Ham United.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim tells Man Utd flops to prove Sir Jim Ratcliffe wrong after brutal verdict
arts.sum: Manchester United chief Sir Jim Ratcliffe did not hold back in a recent interview as he claimed some players were overpaid and not good enough, and Ruben Amorim has urged the squad to use his words as inspiration

arts.ttl: Man United pair to miss Real Sociedad clash through injury
arts.sum: Premier League giants Manchester United will be forced to make do without two important members of the club’s backline in their upcoming meeting with Real Sociedad. The pair in question?…

arts.ttl: Man Utd facing major financial hurdle over summer Marcus Rashford sale
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford's loan deal at Aston Villa contains a £40m option to buy.
